CustomField.description: Field used by middleware, returns true if Membership is "Senaste medlemskap", active and not deceased
CustomField.formula: AND( SenasteMedlemskap__c = true, OR(Status__c = "Aktiv", Status__c = "Begärt utträde"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(ExitReason__c, 'Avliden')))
CustomField.label: Aktivt medlemskap
